title: Will future versions support P2P/NAT mode?
body: Will future versions support P2P/NAT mode? It would solve the problem where edge devices can only connect to the server, but the server can't connect to the edge devices.

comments.body:
I can't speak to the question directly presented, but the runtime _is_ gradually shifting to support persistent gRPC connections (e.g. the client opening the connection to the server and just leaving it open for server-side traffic to flow through). I think that would facilitate the idea you have in mind, right?

This has already been the case for Workflows and was just enabled for Actors in 1.18. I don't know any timelines for if/when it'll be supported for other building blocks as well.

thank you for your reply.
